build.buildCommand: if [ -f pom.xml ]; then mvn -DskipTests package; elif [ -f BE/pom.xml ]; then mvn -f BE/pom.xml -DskipTests package; else echo 'pom.xml not found'; exit 1; fi

deploy.startCommand: if [ -f target/collaborative-java-workspace-backend-1.0.0.jar ]; then java -Dserver.port=$PORT -jar target/collaborative-java-workspace-backend-1.0.0.jar; elif [ -f BE/target/collaborative-java-workspace-backend-1.0.0.jar ]; then java -Dserver.port=$PORT -jar BE/target/collaborative-java-workspace-backend-1.0.0.jar; else echo 'jar not found'; exit 1; fi
